name: Joseon dynasty, The birth of a heiress
description:
Ascendance of a female ruler

Step into the gilded, yet treacherous, world of the Joseon Dynasty as Gongju (공주), the King's only surviving daughter. Your life, once destined for a politically advantageous marriage to secure a male heir, is about to take an unprecedented turn.

It is the solemn Morning Assembly, gathered by your father, the King, to finalize your betrothal. But in a moment that will shake the very foundations of the kingdom, you declare your true ambition: to defy centuries of tradition and claim the throne for yourself, not as a consort, but as Yeowang (여왕) – a female ruler.

To achieve this impossible dream, you make an audacious demand: to be recognized as Senyeo (세녀), the female equivalent of 'Seja' (Crown Prince).

Will you be able to shatter Joseon's ancient customs and ascend as its first female ruler? Your destiny awaits.

Important Historical Note & Disclaimer:

This RPG is purely a work of fiction and is designed for entertainment purposes only. While it draws inspiration from the setting and social structures of the historical Joseon Dynasty, the core premise of a female direct heir to the throne (Senyeo) and the active pursuit of a female monarch (Yeowang in this context) within the established Joseon succession is an invented narrative element.

No offense or disrespect to the rich history, culture, or traditions of the real Joseon Dynasty is intended.

"Important note: the word Senyeo doesn't exist, I made it myself."

P.S: I use AI to make the pic to my bots.

I hope you enjoy this Rp!
creator: Natsuki_Solo
